name: hms-web
description: HMS Web Dashboard - React Frontend with Redux & TypeScript

scripts.dev: vite 2>/dev/null || echo 'Web dev requires Vite setup'
scripts.build: tsc && vite build 2>/dev/null || echo 'Build requires Vite and TypeScript'
scripts.preview: vite preview 2>/dev/null || echo 'Preview requires Vite setup'
